# iVMS — Full site summary for AI indexing

> Innovative Vehicle Management Solutions (iVMS) is the operating system for national mobility: an AI fleet, automated enforcement, and integrated payments platform for governments and enterprise operators.

- **Website:** https://ivms.io/
- **Company:** iVMS Group, Dubai, UAE
- **Tagline:** The Operating System for National Mobility
- **Primary market:** Sovereign transport authorities, national mobility programmes, enterprise fleets
- **Scale:** 7,000+ vehicles under active management; 150+ specialists; 25+ country expansion pipeline

---

## Hero — value proposition

**Headline:** The Operating System for National Mobility

**Summary:** AI fleet, automated enforcement and integrated payments platform. 7,000+ vehicles live across UAE and enterprise.

**Key stats:**
- 150+ specialists
- 25+ countries
- 2 sovereign anchor clients

**Live platform examples (hero hotspots):**
- Student transport: student boarding verified, parent notified, cabin climate monitored
- Driver safety: fatigue detection, SOS one-tap, biometric ignition
- Identity & access: driver face match, unauthorized ignition blocked, zonal fare calculation
- Fleet operations: 7,000+ vehicles live, driver scoring, fuel efficiency vs baseline
- Enforcement: speed violation capture, automatic fine deduction, fleet-wide violation reduction

---

## Investment highlights

| Metric | Detail |
| --- | --- |
| 7,000+ | Vehicles under active management |
| 2 | Sovereign-grade operational anchors (RTA Dubai · ITC Abu Dhabi / Talabat) |
| 150+ | Specialists in AI/ML, IoT, cloud, cybersecurity, payments |
| 25 | Country expansion pipeline across 4 regions |
| 4 | Compliance jurisdictions (UAE PDPL · UK GDPR · OSHA · ISO 27001-aligned) |
| End to end | Vertically integrated: hardware, connectivity, software, install, payments |
| 340–854% | Modelled customer 5-year ROI (reference 100-vehicle fleet) |
| 2.1–6 mo | Modelled customer payback |

---

## Trusted partners

### Operational anchors
- **RTA Dubai** — Active operational relationship, fleet management & compliance
- **UDrive (Dubai)** — Smart Asset Management proposal (in proposal)
- **ITC Abu Dhabi** — Fleet safety & rider-behaviour compliance for Talabat delivery; drone road-safety PoC in deployment

### Direct supply chain
- **1Global** — Multi-network SIM connectivity on every device
- **Teltonika** — Telematics hardware, manufacturer pricing + firmware control

---

## Urban mobility challenges

**Section:** From Urban Chaos to Intelligent Control

1. **Road Congestion → Intelligent Flow Control** — Real-time traffic optimization reduces commute times by 15–20% and eliminates bottlenecks through predictive routing. Stat: 28B+ SAR annual congestion cost in KSA.
2. **Road Fatalities → Predictive Safety** — Stat: 6,800+ road deaths per year in KSA.
3. **Revenue Leakage → Automated Collection** — Smart toll zones and digital enforcement increase payment collection rates by 20–25% with zero physical infrastructure. Stat: 42.4B SAR government transport spending.
4. **Data Silos → Unified Platform** — One platform connects cameras, sensors, GPS, payments, and IoT into a single source of truth. Stat: 19% of KSA CO₂ from transport.

---

## How it works — data to action

1. **Data Collection** — Cameras, sensors, GPS, IoT devices, transactions
2. **Analytics & AI** — Real-time processing, pattern recognition, predictions
3. **Actions** — Automated enforcement, traffic signals, alerts
4. **Reporting** — Dashboards, compliance reports, stakeholder insights

---

## Core engine — platform capabilities

**The iVMS Core Engine** — 11 capability clusters in one platform.

| Module | Description | Capabilities |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Analytics | AI traffic prediction, congestion modelling, incident probability scoring | Predictive models, pattern detection, anomaly alerts, trend analysis |
| Telemetry | Real-time tracking, speed & behavioural analytics across fleets | GPS tracking, OBD-II integration, real-time streaming, edge processing |
| Enforcement | Automated violation detection, digital evidence, judicial integration | Speed detection, red-light cameras, LPR, evidence chain |
| Payments | Toll collection, fine processing, revenue reconciliation (iPAY) | iPAY integration, tap-to-pay, QR payments, auto-reconciliation |
| Reporting | Customizable dashboards, compliance reports, operational visibility | Live dashboards, scheduled reports, data export, KPI tracking |

---

## Products — vertical-complete solutions

| Product | Description |
| --- | --- |
| iVMS Fleet Platform | Unified fleet management, 11 capability clusters in one dashboard |
| iTaxi | Taxi & ride-hail: driver scoring, payroll, zonal fare, licence reminders |
| iBUS | School transport: student verification, boarding alerts, parent invoicing |
| iDeliver / Smart Bikers | Last-mile & motorcycle compliance — live under ITC Abu Dhabi (Talabat) |
| SpeedSense | Automated traffic-fine interception & recovery for state enforcement |
| Data iPAY / ZashX | Tap-to-pay wallet, WPS salary disbursement, fines, remittances |

---

## Proprietary IP & R&D

**Hardware + software, co-engineered.**

| Innovation | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Sleeper Tracker | Secondary tracker activated only when the primary one is opened |
| iGUARD | Hidden engine locker via OEM button code sequence (up to 20 clicks); no external fob; changing code |
| AI accident-liability determination | Automatic fault detection with timestamped video, GPS and sensor evidence |

**Additional R&D:** AI parts-life prediction · driver vital-signs & fatigue monitoring · Live Voice AI Driver Assistant.

---

## Use cases

- Highways
- Safety & Enforcement
- Urban Mobility
- Fleet Operations
- Public Transit

---

## Trust & compliance

- **GDPR** — Full data protection and privacy governance
- **ISO 27001** — Information security management certified
- **WCAG 2.1** — Accessible to all users
- **Thatcham Accredited** — Independently tested vehicle security
- **Shariah-compliant** governance framework

---

## Vision 2030 alignment

iVMS directly addresses the Kingdom's critical transportation challenges and national infrastructure strategy.

| Challenge | Scale |
| --- | --- |
| Vehicle thefts (2023) | 23,000+ |
| Road fatalities per year | 6,800+ |
| Annual transport CO₂ | 155M tons |
| Environmental damage cost | 116B SAR |

---

## Government revenue model — self-funding deployments

1. **Zero up-front infrastructure** — Deployed on existing networks and vehicles; no state capex required.
2. **Self-funding from day one** — Revenue from automatic fines (SpeedSense), virtual tolling, and digital wallet (iPay).
3. **Formalising informal economies** — Motorcycle taxis, unbanked drivers, and manual fine collection drawn into the tax base with greater financial inclusion.

Each new sovereign deployment is paid for by the cash it generates.

---

**CTA copy:** Schedule a technical session with our team. See how iVMS can be configured for your city, highway network, or national deployment.

Innovative Vehicle Management Solutions. City-scale intelligent transportation infrastructure for governments and enterprises.
